title: ClassLogger
description: Built a mobile attendance system to prevent proxy marking using face recognition and classroom WiFi verification. Used FaceNet embeddings with KNN for identity matching, with an Android (Kotlin) app and a FastAPI backend integrated with Firebase.

title: credit-card-defaults
description: Analyzed credit card default patterns using real-world data to understand key risk factors like credit score, demographics, and payment history. Built models and evaluated performance using metrics like ROC-AUC while focusing on false positives and false negatives.

title: UIDAI-Hackathon
description: Built a data-driven dashboard to analyze digital equity and predict Aadhaar service demand across states and districts. Used Streamlit with Pandas and Plotly to visualize metrics and highlight high-risk areas with actionable insights.

title: Talentarium
description: Built an online learning platform where users can browse courses, sign up, and enroll through a responsive web interface. Focused on clean UI, smooth navigation, and a scalable structure using HTML, CSS, JavaScript and React.

title: Attendence-System
description: Built a Raspberry Pi-based face recognition attendance system that detects and logs attendance in real time using a webcam. Used OpenCV for face detection and a Flask-based interface to manage and store attendance data.

title: Wordle Clone
description: Built a Wordle-style game in Python where users guess a 5-letter word with real-time feedback. Implemented game logic, input validation, and statistics tracking to create a complete and replayable experience.
